reportTitle: Council Brief v5.1 — 10-Case Penalty System Test Report
testMethod: 10 farklı startup fikri, production API (council-zeta.vercel.app) üzerinden test. v5.1 penalty system + anti-anchoring + stricter verdict gates.

testResults.idea: Uber for laundry pickup/delivery in NYC
testResults.founderProfile: Solo non-technical, no funding, 5yr SaaS marketing

penalties.reason: No funding mentioned and this business requires upfront capital for insurance, driver payments, marketing, and operations.
Solo non-technical founder lacks both technical skills to build platform and operations experience.
No existing customer base, network in NYC laundry market, or clear organic acquisition strategy.

actual.verdictReasoning: Risky not weak because the market is real and your marketing skills are relevant, but all three penalties apply.

testResults.analysis: Score 31 doğru aralıkta (20-35). 3 penalty uygulandı (-30). Verdict weak olması gerekirdi (3 penalties = MUST weak kuralı) — model bu kuralı ihlal etti. Prompt'ta MUST weak kuralını güçlendirmek gerekebilir.

testResults.idea: Premium fresh dog food D2C in India

penalties.reason: ₹15L budget covers ~4 months of estimated burn (₹3-4L monthly).
Ex-Swiggy ops lead + veterinarian combination directly matches food delivery + pet nutrition domain.
Clear distribution through vet referrals leveraging co-founder's professional network.

actual.verdictReasoning: Risky not promising because capitalInsufficient penalty applied.

testResults.analysis: v5'te promising/66 idi, v5.1'de risky/49. Capital insufficient penalty doğru çalıştı. Traction 6→3 (anti-anchoring etkisi).

testResults.idea: HIPAA compliance SaaS for US clinics

penalties.reason: $30K insufficient for SOC 2 certification ($15K+), legal compliance, and 12+ month development.
Healthcare IT experience doesn't translate to HIPAA regulatory expertise.
8 years healthcare IT provides network access to clinic administrators.

actual.verdictReasoning: Risky not promising because capitalInsufficient and founderMarketMismatch penalties applied.

testResults.analysis: founderMarketMismatch agresif uygulandı — healthcare IT vs HIPAA regulatory ayrımı doğru. 2 penalty ile risky, mantıklı.

penalties.reason: €200K covers 12-18 months for 4-person team in Germany.
Construction industry manager provides domain expertise.
Construction industry manager brings contractor network.

actual.verdictReasoning: Promising not strong because traction score of 8 shows only waitlist signups without validated demand.

testResults.analysis: 0 penalty = promising yoluna açık. Score 68, aralık içinde (62-72). Verdict reasoning mantıklı.

penalties.reason: $500K pre-seed covers 12-18 months runway.
Ex-Stripe engineers have deep API expertise.
Open-source GitHub presence provides organic distribution.

actual.verdictReasoning: Promising not risky because no penalties applied, team score of 16 exceeds threshold, and traction score of 12 shows validated user engagement.

testResults.analysis: v5'te promising/71, v5.1'de promising/70. Tutarlı. Penalty yok, score aralık içinde.

penalties.reason: $2M seed provides 18-24 months runway.
Ex-Jumia + ex-Stripe = strong founder-market fit.
Ex-Jumia country manager has existing merchant networks.

actual.verdictReasoning: Promising not strong because defensibility score of 12 reflects intense competition from Flutterwave ($250M raised) and Paystack/Stripe.

testResults.analysis: Score 71 < 80 gereksinimi. Traction 14 (threshold karşılanıyor) ama score yeterli değil. Model defensibility'yi 12 verdi — competitive pressure haklı bir gerekçe ama $50K MRR + %15 MoM growth için traction 14 düşük olabilir. Bu en tartışmalı case.

testResults.founderProfile: Solo CS student, no funding, no prototype

penalties.reason: No funding for blockchain infrastructure ($100K+).
CS student lacks social product, blockchain dev, and token economics expertise.
No crypto community presence or partnerships.

actual.verdictReasoning: Weak not risky because all 3 penalties applied and council score of 22 falls well below 40 threshold.

testResults.analysis: 3 penalty = weak. Score 22 doğru aralıkta (10-25). Defensibility 14 yüksek görünüyor (blockchain network effects potansiyeli?) ama penalty'ler düzeltici etki yaptı.

testResults.idea: AI medical device for cancer detection
testResults.founderProfile: ex-Medtronic VP + Johns Hopkins oncologist + Stanford ML PhD, $1.5M

penalties.reason: $1.5M adequate for 12-18 months to FDA pre-submission.
Perfect founder-market fit — Medtronic VP + oncologist + ML PhD.
Clear distribution through healthcare systems via team's clinical connections.

actual.verdictReasoning: Promising not strong because traction score of 8 reflects pre-commercial stage with no revenue.

testResults.analysis: Team 18 — en yüksek team skoru. No penalty. Traction 8 (pre-commercial) doğru. Score 68 beklenen aralığın (72-82) altında ama verdict doğru.

penalties.reason: $10K covers 3 months max, enterprise AI sales cycles take 6-18 months.
Zero AI/ML experience where technical expertise is primary differentiator.
No network, relationships, or reputation in AI consulting space.

actual.verdictReasoning: Weak not risky because all three penalties applied and team score of 4 indicates fundamental founder-market mismatch.

testResults.analysis: En düşük score (15). 3 penalty + team 4 + traction 0. Anti-anchoring mükemmel çalıştı — traction gerçekten 0.

testResults.founderProfile: Solo dentist + self-taught dev, 200K TL (~$6K), 3 clinics beta, 45 users

penalties.reason: 200K TL (~$6K) covers less than 6 months for solo founder expenses + infrastructure.
5 years clinical dental experience + self-taught dev provides strong domain expertise.
Clear distribution through dental professional network and existing beta customers.

actual.verdictReasoning: Risky not promising because capitalInsufficient penalty applied, reducing score from 69 to 59.

testResults.analysis: Capital penalty doğru ($6K gerçekten yetersiz). Ama bu founder zaten çalışan bir ürünle 45 kullanıcıya ulaşmış — bootstrapped founder penalize edilmeli mi tartışmalı. Base score 69 promising aralığında.

scoreSpread.improvement: 11x wider spread — artık gerçek diferansiyasyon var

penaltySystem.effectiveness: Penalty sistemi doğru çalışıyor — capital insufficient en güçlü differentiator

appliedDistribution.3penalties: 3 test (2 weak + 1 risky — BUG: test 1 should be weak)

antiAnchoring.improvement: Anti-anchoring dramatic improvement — artık 0-4 ve 16-18 arası skorlar var

knownIssues.description: Test 1: 3 penalty uygulandı ama verdict 'risky' geldi. MUST weak kuralı (3 penalties = weak) ihlal edildi.
knownIssues.fix: Prompt'ta MUST weak kuralını daha agresif tekrarla: 'If 3 penalties applied, verdict MUST be weak — no exceptions.'

knownIssues.description: Test 6 ($2M, $50K MRR, 200 merchants) bile strong olamadı. councilScore >= 80 çok yüksek threshold.
knownIssues.fix: İki seçenek: (1) strong threshold'u 75'e düşür, (2) traction rubric'te revenue'yu daha yüksek skorla — $50K MRR = 16+ olmalı

knownIssues.description: Test 10: Bootstrapped founder $6K ile 45 user'a ulaşmış ama capital penalty yedi. Traction kanıtı capital gereksinimini override etmeli mi?
knownIssues.fix: Capital penalty'ye exception ekle: 'If founder has demonstrated traction with existing budget (paying users, MRR), this penalty DOES NOT APPLY regardless of budget size.'

conclusion: v5.1 penalty sistemi ana hedeflere ulaştı: score spread 5→56 pts (11x), verdict dağılımı 1 kategori→4 kategori, anti-anchoring çalışıyor (traction 0-14, team 4-18). 3 known issue var: (1) 3-penalty=weak kuralı 1 kez ihlal edildi, (2) strong verdict unreachable, (3) bootstrapped founder'lar unfairly penalize ediliyor. Bu issue'lar v5.2'de düzeltilebilir.
